class.name: iros_llm_rviz_panel/LlmPanel
class.description: Operator-facing chat panel for iros_llm_swarm. Streams replies from /llm/chat, displays /bt/state in a status strip, and publishes goal markers on /llm_panel/markers. Includes a STOP ALL button that bypasses the LLM via /llm/command{mode=idle}.
